build_system: CMake 3.22 with vendored third-party deps in third_party/ (spdlog, nlohmann_json, doctest, sqlite3 stub)
test_framework: doctest with test_main.cpp providing DOCTEST_CONFIG_IMPLEMENT_WITH_MAIN. Tests organized in tests/<module>/ subdirectories
verification_instructions: 1) cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF, 2) cmake --build build, 3) cd build && ctest --output-on-failure
setup_instructions: Build uses vendored deps - no external packages needed. cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF && cmake --build build
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external downloads. All deps already vendored in third_party/. GCC 11.5 and CMake 3.22 pre-installed.
contribution_requirements: C++20 standard, use existing patterns (Result<T>, ModuleLogger, EventBus, ServiceLocator). Static libraries per module.
key_patterns: Namespace: ThreatOne::<Module>. Each module has include/<module>/*.h and src/*.cpp. Interface classes prefix I (e.g., IScanEngine). ModuleLogger from core for logging. Result<T> for error handling. nlohmann::json for JSON. doctest TEST_CASE with SUBCASE for tests. CMakeLists.txt per module adds static library with PUBLIC include dirs.
directory_structure: src/<module>/include/<module>/*.h + src/<module>/src/*.cpp. tests/<module>/test_*.cpp. cmake/ for build modules. third_party/ for vendored libs.
